url.description: The HTTP or HTTPS URL to fetch content from

format.description: The format to return the content in (text, markdown, or html). Defaults to markdown.

readable.description: When true, extract the main article content (Reader Mode) before converting. Only applies to HTML pages. Defaults to false.

description: Fetch content from an HTTP or HTTPS URL and return it as text, markdown, or HTML
author: Yi-Lin
name: webfetch
